subject: 信实工业
object: 多款AI服务，涵盖通话、应用与家居
source_quote: At its annual shareholder meeting on Friday, the Mumbai-based conglomerate announced Jio Call Agent, an AI assistant that can join phone calls to transcribe conversations, generate summaries, and perform tasks such as booking cabs, ordering food, and making reservations. The service, which can be activated by saying “Hey Jio,” is expected to launch later this year for Jio’s more than 500 million users.

subject: Pivot
object: $40m Series B to pitch an agentic-AI procurement OS at the enterprises legacy software has not fixed
source_quote: Pivot, the Paris and New York-based procurement-software start-up, has raised $40m in a Series B led by Forestay Capital and Notion Capital, taking the company’s total funding since its 2023 founding to $70m.

subject: Pivot
object: $40m Series B to pitch an agentic-AI procurement OS at the enterprises legacy software has not fixed
source_quote: The round sits inside an active fortnight for European agentic-AI enterprise software. Dust closed its own $40m Series B earlier this month on a thesis that the AI agent that wins the workplace is the one with frictionless distribution inside existing communication surfaces; Synera raised $40m for agentic AI in engineering workflows; and Pivot lands as the third European $40m-tier enterprise agentic-AI raise inside a month.

subject: Grupo Bimbo cuts audit times by 20% with agents built in Microsoft Copilot Studio,
object: through Microsoft 365 Copilot | Microsoft Customer Stories
source_quote: Grupo Bimbo cuts audit times by 20% with agents built in Microsoft Copilot Studio, deployed through Microsoft 365 Copilot "> Grupo Bimbo cuts audit times by 20% with agents built in Microsoft Copilot Studio, deployed through Microsoft 365 Copilot

subject: Grupo Bimbo cuts audit times by 20% with agents built in Microsoft Copilot Studio,
object: through Microsoft 365 Copilot | Microsoft Customer Stories
source_quote: Grupo Bimbo built Audit Assist and Comatrix using Microsoft Copilot Studio, deployed via Microsoft 365 Copilot and Microsoft Teams, connecting directly to SharePoint for real-time, policy-aligned audit guidance and automation.

subject: Grupo Bimbo cuts audit times by 20% with agents built in Microsoft Copilot Studio,
object: through Microsoft 365 Copilot | Microsoft Customer Stories
source_quote: To address these challenges, Grupo Bimbo used Microsoft Copilot Studio to create two AI agents—Audit Assist and Comatrix—and deployed them through Microsoft 365 Copilot and Microsoft Teams . Together, the agents automate parts of the audit workflow, reducing the planning-phase audit completion time by 20%, improving job satisfaction, and helping auditors deliver higher-quality audits with greater confidence.

subject: Grupo Bimbo cuts audit times by 20% with agents built in Microsoft Copilot Studio,
object: through Microsoft 365 Copilot | Microsoft Customer Stories
source_quote: Using Microsoft Copilot Studio, Grupo Bimbo rebuilt an earlier experimental solution and deployed the new agent through Microsoft 365 Copilot and Microsoft Teams in a single phase in September 2025. Auditors who proposed the idea stayed closely involved in development and testing, ensuring the agent reflected real audit workflows.

subject: OpenBox AI
object: First Enterprise AI Trust Platform Built for Everyone, Backed by $5M Seed Round
source_quote: As the White House unveils its National AI Legislative Framework and the EU AI Act enters enforcement, OpenBox delivers the governance infrastructure regulators are demanding — available for every organization, from day one.

subject: OpenBox AI
object: First Enterprise AI Trust Platform Built for Everyone, Backed by $5M Seed Round
source_quote: SAN FRANCISCO , March 31, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- The governance crisis in enterprise AI is no longer theoretical. On 20 March 2026, the Trump Administration unveiled a comprehensive National AI Legislative Framework — its most ambitious federal AI policy move to date — calling for consistent national standards that guard against AI-enabled fraud, protect consumers, and accelerate responsible deployment across American industry. Simultaneously, the EU AI Act's compliance obligations for high-risk AI systems are now in force. Together, these milestones mark a new era: AI governance has become a regulatory and boardroom imperative, not a future consideration.

subject: OpenBox AI
object: First Enterprise AI Trust Platform Built for Everyone, Backed by $5M Seed Round
source_quote: Today, OpenBox announces its public launch and a $5 million seed funding round led by Tykhe Ventures, bringing enterprise-grade AI governance infrastructure to every organization deploying AI agents, regardless of size, geography, or budget.

subject: OpenBox AI
object: First Enterprise AI Trust Platform Built for Everyone, Backed by $5M Seed Round
source_quote: The Trump Administration's National AI Legislative Framework directly addresses this gap, calling on Congress to combat AI-enabled scams, protect intellectual property, and ensure AI systems strengthen — rather than undermine — American communities and businesses. For enterprises operating under this framework, demonstrating agentic AI governance is now a compliance obligation, not an option.

subject: Cloudflare 为 AI 智能体
object: 临时账户
source_quote: This is just one way we’re eliminating the signup barrier for agents. We recently announced a partnership with Stripe and a new protocol we co-designed that lets agents provision Cloudflare on behalf of their users — creating an account, starting a subscription, registering a domain, and getting an API token to deploy code, with no copy-pasting tokens or entering credit card details. Last month, we collaborated with WorkOS on the launch of auth.md , which anyone can adopt, to let agents provision new accounts using well-established, existing OAuth standards.

subject: Union.ai
object: $10M to simplify ML workflow orchestration
source_quote: Union.ai raises $10M to simplify AI and ML workflow orchestration

subject: Union.ai
object: $10M to simplify ML workflow orchestration
source_quote: Union.ai , a startup emerging from stealth with a commercial version of the open source AI orchestration platform Flyte, today announced that it raised $10 million in a round contributed by NEA and “select” angel investors. CEO Ketan Umare says that the proceeds will be put toward supporting the Flyte community by “improving the accessibility, performance and reliability of Flyte” and broadening the array of systems that Flyte integrates with.

subject: Union.ai
object: $10M to simplify ML workflow orchestration
source_quote: That’s where Flyte comes in — a platform for programming and processing concurrent AI and data analytics workflows. Union’s team, including Umare, helped to build Flyte while at Lyft, where it was used to help create a system to calculate the estimated time of arrival (ETA) for drivers to get from point A to point B.

subject: Union.ai
object: $10M to simplify ML workflow orchestration
source_quote: “A managed version of Flyte, called Union Cloud, will allow smaller teams and organizations to use the power of Flyte without the need to staff up on infrastructure teams,” Umare continued. “We [founded Union] because we believe that machine learning and data workflows are fundamentally different from software deployments. This is because software is more precise with a slower lifecycle while machine learning and data workflows start off being experimental and may need to be quickly productionized.”

subject: 英特尔与AMD联合
object: ACE 1.15规范，增强x86架构AI算力
source_quote: IT之家 6 月 20 日消息，科技媒体 Wccftech 昨日（6 月 19 日）发布博文，报道称 x86 生态系统咨询小组（EAG）发布 ACE 规范 1.15 版本， 通过原生矩阵乘法引擎和低精度格式增强 x86 架构的 AI 性能。

subject: 英特尔与AMD联合
object: ACE 1.15规范，增强x86架构AI算力
source_quote: 技术细节方面，ACE 在现有 AVX 向量指令基础上，新增了“图块寄存器”（tile register）状态，并定义了数据移动与处理操作。
